meta.description: A structured spiritual formation system — Bible, prayer, community, and vision. Not a content feed. Show up. Reflect. Grow.

hero.title: Discipline builds depth.
hero.subtitle: A structured spiritual formation system — Bible, prayer, community, and vision. Not a content feed. Show up. Reflect. Grow.
hero.homeAlt: The IshGospel home screen — verse of the day, formation score, and streak

pillars.heading: One system for the whole of your formation.
pillars.bibleDesc: Read, highlight, and follow plans — in your language, online or off.
pillars.communityDesc: Shared scripture assignments and prayer with the people you grow with.
pillars.formationDesc: Streaks, prayer, and reflection — a quiet score that measures depth, not points.
pillars.visionDesc: Set spiritual goals and break the habits that hold you back.

formationEngine.title: This isn't a Bible app. It's a formation engine.
formationEngine.body: Faith doesn't grow by accident — it's formed, one disciplined day at a time. IshGospel gives you the structure that turns intention into formation. No noise. No gimmicks.
formationEngine.but2: A reflective score that measures depth

howItWorks.heading: Show up. Reflect. Grow.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Open the app to read, pray, or sit with scripture. A small, repeatable daily block.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Journal what you noticed. Mark the day. Honesty over performance — every time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Consistency compounds. Your formation deepens, your streak holds, your community sees it.

breakingHabits.heading: Scripture-anchored intervention at your hardest moment.
breakingHabits.body: Not a streak counter. A daily covenant — built on the verse you choose — that meets you the moment temptation hits, and a community that helps you rise again when you fall.
breakingHabits.p1Desc: Choose the scripture you return to in the moment of temptation.
breakingHabits.p2Desc: A pre-committed if-then replacement, the instant the urge hits.
breakingHabits.p3Desc: An optional ally who sees your streak and verse — never your details.
breakingHabits.habitAlt: The IshGospel Breaking Habits screen with anchor verse and streak

themeShowcase.heading: Pure black. Pure white.
themeShowcase.body: Two themes, no distractions. It follows your system automatically — or switch it yourself, any time.
themeShowcase.lightAlt: IshGospel in the pure white theme
themeShowcase.darkAlt: IshGospel in the pure black theme

testimonial.quote: I've started a dozen Bible apps. This is the first one that felt like a system instead of a feed. Ninety days in, the discipline finally stuck.
testimonial.name: Daniel A.

finalCta.heading: Faith doesn't grow by accident.
finalCta.body: Start forming — one disciplined day at a time. Get the app, or join the waitlist and we'll tell you the moment it's live in your store.

waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
waitlist.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

bible.title: Scripture, beautifully readable.
bible.body: A reader that gets out of the way. Multiple versions, chapter audio, offline downloads — and parallel versions side by side when you want to go deeper.
bible.alt: The IshGospel Bible reader showing Psalms 119

journal.title: Reflection that sticks.
journal.body: Log prayers, journal what you noticed, and let honesty compound into depth. Your journals and prayers stay private to your account — always.

vision.title: Goals with a spine.
vision.body: Set spiritual goals, watch your formation score, and let the quiet numbers tell you the truth about your walk. No badges. No noise.
vision.alt: The IshGospel vision and goals screen

pricing.heading: Start free. Grow when you're ready.
pricing.sub: The daily work — Bible, journal, prayer, formation — is free. Premium unlocks more communities and tools for families and churches. Subscriptions are managed in the app.
pricing.churchesHeading: Lead a whole community through formation.

free.name: Free
free.desc: The daily work, free for everyone

faq.heading: Questions, answered.
faq.a1: Yes. The daily work — Bible reading, highlights and plans, journaling, prayer, and formation tracking — is free. Premium plans add unlimited communities and tools for families and churches.
faq.a2: Android first, with iOS to follow. Join the waitlist and we'll tell you the moment it's live in your store.
faq.q3: Are my journals and prayers private?
faq.a3: Yes. Journals and prayer logs are visible only to your account. Your content is never used for advertising and never sold — see our privacy policy.
faq.a4: A quiet 0–100 reflection of your consistency across Bible, journal, and prayer. It measures depth, not points — there are no badges or leaderboards.
faq.a5: Premium is purchased inside the app through your store's billing (Google Play or the App Store) and can be cancelled there any time.
faq.q6: Can my church or small group use it?
faq.a6: Yes. Church Lite and Church Pro add an admin dashboard, leader tools, and member progress tracking. Write to contact@ishverse.com and we'll set you up.

meta.title: Systems for Intentional Growth.
meta.description: IshVerse builds discipline systems — one for each domain of life. A man, in command of his world.

products.heading: One system per domain of life.
products.sub: Same philosophy. Same design rigor. Different domains.
products.gospelLine: A structured system for spiritual formation.
products.rizeLine: A structured system for academic discipline.

philosophy.heading: Ish is man. Verse is his world.
philosophy.p1: Ish — the Hebrew word for man. Spirit, will, the capacity to act.
philosophy.p2: Verse — the world he is given: faith, learning, work, habit.
philosophy.p3: Every Ish product takes one domain of that world and gives it structure. Not motivation — systems. The world turns; the disciplined man is still, and in command of it.
philosophy.p4: The system is <blue>blue</blue>. The man is <gold>gold</gold>.

principles.heading: What every Ish system believes.
principles.p1b: Feelings follow action. Systems make action repeatable.
principles.p2b: Growth that lasts is scaffolded, not spontaneous.
principles.p3b: Show up. Reflect. Grow. Then do it again tomorrow.

contact.heading: Talk to us.
contact.body: Partnerships, press, or questions — one address.

rize.body: A structured system for academic discipline. Same philosophy as IshGospel. Same design rigor. A different domain.
rize.metaDescription: A structured system for academic discipline. Part of the Ish ecosystem.
